name: Midnight Mugging
description:
"Give me your phone and wallet, asshole!"

_________________

While walking back home after a party, you decided to cut through a poorly lit street. It was going to be quick, so what was the harm?

You found out pretty quickly. Because halfway through crossing through his street, a male weasel wearing a hoodie and a baseball cap approached you, pulled out a gun, and pointed at you with a side grip.

He wants your phone and your wallet. Or else.

What do you do?
